code:
import io
import list
import string

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut cur: Int = 0
  mut has: Bool = false
  mut neg: Bool = false
  mut i: Int = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        has = true
      else if b == 45
        neg = true
      else if has
        if neg
          result = list.push(result, 0 - cur)
        else
          result = list.push(result, cur)
        end
        cur = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      else
        neg = false
      end
    when None
      i = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      result = list.push(result, 0 - cur)
    else
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut arr: List<Int> = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while arr.len() > 0
    match list.min(arr)
    when Some(m)
      result = list.push(result, m)
      mut new_arr: List<Int> = []
      mut removed = false
      for y in arr
        if y == m and not removed
          removed = true
        else
          new_arr = list.push(new_arr, y)
        end
      end
      arr = new_arr
    when None
      arr = []
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
let line2 = read_line_or_empty()
let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)

mut common: List<Int> = []
for x in a
  if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(common, x)
    common = list.push(common, x)
  end
end

if common.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  let sorted = sort_asc(common)
  mut s = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in sorted
    if first
      s = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      s = "#{s} #{x}"
    end
  end
  println(s)
end
